mapper.select: select id as id, appointment_no as appointmentNo, owner_user_id as ownerUserId, owner_id as ownerId, pet_id as petId, doctor_id as doctorId, service_item_id as serviceItemId, service_type as serviceType, appointment_time as appointmentTime, symptom_desc as symptomDesc, remark as remark, source_type as sourceType, status as status, status_text as statusText, cancel_reason as cancelReason, verified_by as verifiedBy, verified_time as verifiedTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from appointment where id = #{id}

select id as id, appointment_no as appointmentNo, owner_user_id as ownerUserId, owner_id as ownerId, pet_id as petId, doctor_id as doctorId, service_item_id as serviceItemId, service_type as serviceType, appointment_time as appointmentTime, symptom_desc as symptomDesc, remark as remark, source_type as sourceType, status as status, status_text as statusText, cancel_reason as cancelReason, verified_by as verifiedBy, verified_time as verifiedTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from appointment order by id desc

select a.id as id, a.appointment_no as appointmentNo, a.appointment_time as appointmentTime, a.service_type as serviceType, a.status as status, a.status_text as statusText, p.name as petName, p.species as petSpecies, su.real_name as ownerName, su.phone as ownerPhone, dp.name as doctorName from appointment a left join pet p on p.id = a.pet_id left join sys_user su on su.id = ifnull(a.owner_user_id, a.owner_id) left join doctor_profile dp on dp.id = a.doctor_id where a.is_deleted = 0 order by a.id desc
